Description: The name or title of this group. This value is used in drop-downs in other lists. It does not necessarily have to be the same as the group name in MCommunity, MS Teams or Office 365.
A short description of this group and its purpose.
Primary team member who leads or facilitates this group.
Link to view all members of this group in the People list.
Enter the email address of the corresponding MCommunity group to sync its members with the People list.
ValidationFormula: =IF(LEN([MCommunity Group])<=0,TRUE,AND(ISERROR(FIND(" ",[MCommunity Group],1)),IF(ISERROR(FIND("@",[MCommunity Group],2)),FALSE,AND(ISERROR(FIND("@",#NAME?,FIND("@",[MCommunity Group],2)+1)),IF(ISERROR(FIND(".",[MCommunity Group],FIND("@",[MCommunity Group],2)+2)),FALSE,FIND(".",[MCommunity Group],FIND("@",[MCommunity Group],2)+2)<LEN([MCommunity Group]))))))

Description: The MS Teams account for this group, if applicable. Only accounts on the same environment as TrackMaster can be used (e.g. Michigan Medicine).
The shared drive used by this group, if applicable.
The web page for this group, if applicable.
A link to this gorup's Slack workspace.
A link to this group's GitHub or GitLab repo. You can enter the full URL (e.g. https://github.com/DepressionCenter) or just the @ name (e.g. @DepressionCenter).
A link to this group's events calendar.
On what days does this group regularly meet?
Additional notes, comments, links, or important remarks.
For affiliate groups, the primary program that runs them.
If set, recipients of this program, including consultations and events, will be automatically added to this group.
If set, it will automatically add people who have received consultations from the teams specified.
If checked, this item will be kept in sync with MCommunity and/or MS Teams automatically.
Indicates whether this record is active (enabled). Inactive records are hidden by default, and are not used in any automations.
The email address of the primary contact for this group. This value is used for notifications about certain group sync events and/or errors.
Custom tags and keywords for searching.
Group name formatted for displaying in dropdown menus in other lists.
